traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern colors in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.desc: You have resistance to necrotic damage and radiant damage.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.desc: As an action, you can touch a creature and roll a number of d4s equal to your proficiency bonus. The creature regains hit points equal to the total rolled. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.desc: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Celestial Revelation
traits.desc: Once you reach level 3, as a bonus action you can transform using one of these options (Once per long rest): Heavenly Wings, Inner Radiance, Necrotic Shroud. Deal radiant or necrotic damage equal to your proficiency bonus if you hit with an attack or spell

traits.name: Heavenly Wings
traits.desc: You sprout a pair of luminous wings from your back, you have a fly speed equal to your speed for 1 minute.

traits.name: Inner Radiance
traits.desc: Your eyes emit a bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. Any creature within 10 feet takes radiant damage equal to your proficiency bonus at the start of each of your turns.

traits.name: Necrotic Shroud
traits.desc: Your body is surrounded by a shroud of necrotic energy. Ceatures within 10 feet of you must succeed on a charisma saving throw (DC = 8 + your charisma modifier) or have the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern colors in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Astral Fire
traits.desc: You know one of the following cantrips of your choice: Dancing Lights, Light, or Sacred Flame. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it (choose when you select this race).

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.desc: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Starlight Step
traits.desc: As a bonus action, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

traits.name: Astral Trance
traits.desc: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a long rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you remain conscious. Whenever you finish this trance, you gain proficiency in one skill of your choice and with one weapon or tool of your choice, selected from the Player's Handbook. You magically acquire these proficiencies by drawing them from shared elven memory and the experiences of entities on the Astral Plane, and you retain them until you finish your next long rest.
